title: selaginella rupestris f. borealis
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. borealis, also known as the boreal rock spike moss, is a type of evergreen, rhizomatous, and terrestrial fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris f. borealis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption and use.
